name: @atlas/mobile
description: Atlas companion mobile app (Capacitor). Companion mode only: collects Health Connect / HealthKit data and syncs it to a paired desktop running Atlas on the same local network - it does not run its own copy of the FastAPI backend (Python cannot run on iOS, and an Android-only embedding like Chaquopy would not carry over). See docs/mobile-architecture.md.

scripts.cap:sync: npm run build && npx cap sync
scripts.cap:android: npm run cap:sync && npx cap open android
scripts.cap:ios: npm run cap:sync && npx cap open ios
